sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101000" key="sunte/rmwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συντέρμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n101000.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bordering on, close together,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">APl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.185</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
